title: PCB-QA: Evaluating LLMs over the First PCB Design Question-Answer Dataset
abstract: PCB-QA is your go-to tool for testing language models on PCB design questions, using a brand-new dataset. It's like having an expert electronic circuit advisor in your pocket! Wonder how these models fare when confronted with complex schematics? Join us as we uncover the answers together.
abstract_zh: 这回咱可真是过足了“电”瘾！PCB-QA 这个AI工具，就像是你的私人电子电路顾问。它专门针对PCB设计中的问答难题，用一份全新的问题-答案数据集来测试那些大名鼎鼎的语言模型。你是不是也想试试，看看它们在面对复杂电路图时的表现？来吧，让我们一起揭开谜底！
